Claude Code's New AI Agent Update: Why Software is Changing Forever

Anthropic just released a massive update to Claude Code that uses parallel AI agents to automate deep code reviews. Discover how this multi-agent approach triples code quality and catches critical bugs that human reviewers often miss.
